itemListElement.reviewBody: Poor infrastructure.  No AC, fan or ventiliation at badminton or TT courts.  During rains the whole area gets flooded.  Prime space for mosquito breeding and accidents.

itemReviewed.name: Ambience Public School - Sushant Lok Phase I,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody: I visited the school to check on facilities and infra for nursery grade. Initial conversation with help desk and admission incharge was discourteous. I wonder what quality will be imbibed in young kids in such environment. Initial months or years of schooling for any kid should be oriented towards being humble, mannered and good human being. More on behavioural aspects than academics. Although it is preferable for me in terms of location, the dearth of basic mannerism is making me to explore other options. Highly dissatisfied!!!

itemReviewed.name: Ambience Public School - Sushant Lok Phase I,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody:
One of the best schools that I have come across.
This is a school which truly believes in inclusion, participation from all kids and parents and transparency . The teachers are very receptive to any feedback regarding teaching methods, child's needs and adapt accordingly.
I am in a transferable job and have got my 2 kids studied in different schools across cities like Mumbai, Pune, Ahmedabad and Gurgaon. I can vouch for the fact that this school is best in terms of infrastructure, practical approach to learning, teaching methods and quality of teachers.
The principal and vice- principal take special care to have a feedback from parents  and explain their point of view. Being a 3-4 year old school, they have the best infrastructure available, with latest in technology. I was amazed to see astro- turf in football ground.

My son learnt sports like badminton , skating and cricket under a very professional guidance. They have really taken very good sports teachers. This is a second home or my younger son.

The real testimony to their expertise was experienced during COVID times when we ourselves saw the level of involvement of teachers and principal in the online learning sessions. They are also very ethical and not business minded. While other schools in Gurgaon are forcing for entire fee payment, this school clearly followed the govt guidelines and charged only monthly tution fee.

The only drawback that i could find was a delay in starting cafeteria facilities and swimming pool facilities  which for me is a very minor thing as compared to the other positives...

Overall i will give a rating of 9 out of 10.

itemReviewed.name: Ambience Public School - Sushant Lok Phase I,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody: My son is studying in grade 2 Ambience Public School and I am totally satisfied with the school Philosophy. They focus on overall development of the child and 21st century skills and the best part is they give individual attention to all the learners , my son confidence has raised a lot. Thanks a lot to all the Ambience staff for taking care of every step of learning of my child.😊

itemReviewed.name: Ambience Public School - Sushant Lok Phase I,Sector 43

itemListElement.reviewBody: Ambience Public school is a renowned brand full of amenities and facilities. Its a perfect platform for shaping the future of your child. Healthy food, variety of sports activities, great teaching & learning process which is child centered and a lot more …… In a nut shell, it’s the best school in India.   Infrastructure of this school is very good which includes smart boards. All the teachers are well qualified and supporting .Proper guidance is provided to students for enhancing their abilities. Sports are must for every child and school also provides overall development programs for students.
